IC day - Intraday post (22/Dec)

Weekly post:

GDP Release - Weekly post (22-26/Dec) [FREE post]

Let’s look at today’s positioning for intraday trades…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Customers are buying volatility into both up and down, but upside is more bid, forming a net slightly negative speed profile.The center of this fly patter is clustering around 6863.08We also have an IC at 6795/6800 - 6860/6865What he is basically betting on is an upward drift towards the upper wing and center, but no move above that. However, the net profile bets on the opposite. (For today, the weekly post said a more benign-skewed sentiment ahead of GDP) The IC has a strong local impact, however a very risky trade today. Spot should open out of the range in order to move out of it.

The centroid of the profile is at 6857.17 - 6859.55 (close to the center, as the profile is almost symmetric)

Upside pivot is at 6886.26,with upside target of 6896.62margin of error could be like 6908 at max, but it would eventually lead to a reversion back to 6883 and pin there.

Downside pivot is at 6825.82 with downside target of 6798.35This aligns with the IC, and can be touched during the first 2 hours. Then 6815/20 is a pivotal zone. Spot either gets pinned to the lower wing or gravitate towards 6833, with wider swings.

The IC is meant to generate mean reversion and lowering realized volatility locally to juice up liquidity (market making). Relatively low probability for this to happen.
